_comment: UK NBP natural gas front-month (M+1) settlement price in pence per therm. Reference: ICE Endex UK Natural Gas Futures public settlement print plus the daily Reuters energy recap. ICE publishes settlements at close but requires a commercial feed for API access; we mirror the published settlement headline weekly as an editorial fixture. The freshness guard in the adapter rejects any fixture older than 14 days so a forgotten refresh becomes an ingest-audit failure rather than silent rot. TODO(source): swap for a licensed ICE Endex API once budget permits, or use Ofgem's spot-price publication if an authorised mirror appears.

gas_m1.source: ICE Endex UK Natural Gas Futures (front-month) settlement, 17 April 2026

release_schedule: Daily market close (5pm London); editorial fixture refreshed weekly.
